dialogue_text: That is because you have no brains
source_excerpt: "That is because you have no brains" answered the girl. "No matter how dreary and gray our homes are, we people of flesh and blood would rather live there than in any other country, be it ever so beautiful. There is no place like home."

speaker.notes: Attributed through a role label rather than a canonical name.

dialogue_text: Won't you tell me a story, while we are resting?
